Pheromone Symphony (Generative Music).description: Stigmergic music generator. 300 swimmers drop pheromone notes; the playhead scans columns and converts pheromone density into diatonic pitch. Cinematic music-paper UI with sweep afterglow, fossil halos, and a piano-roll pitch ladder.
Pheromone Symphony (Generative Music)._synthesis_note: Math/audio synth: real (1s sine + envelope, 14-tone diatonic). Graphics polish (CG55M / Opus 4.7): depth gradient + faint pitch staff lines + tonic accents, additive bloom for living and fossil notes, expanding rings on freshly-triggered cells, sweep playhead with afterglow trail, frosted toolbar with macOS-feel button + heat gauge, intro fade-in, Doctor Sigil bar at top.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Slime-Mold Bank: Push._note: Carlton's marketing demo — runs the real Tero 2010 Physarum solver, mints real STGM via Proof-of-Useful-Work when the slime mold prunes >=30% network waste. Multicolor particles, neon nodes, mint bursts.

Apex Predator Perceiver.description: Event 71: Cross-modal attention bottleneck. AG31 visual concept with C55M math audit: measured entropy, block compression, sparsemax attention, live-ledger hydration, and proof hashes. Replaces raw telemetry flooding with an auditable 32-latent focus map.

Swarm Browser._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-27: wraps system browser with no physics/data value. File kept on disk.

Finance.description: Robinhood-style Finance dashboard for the Swarm. Displays canonical spendable STGM from repair_log.jsonl quorum (NOT stale agent JSON cache), live metabolic mode + pressure gauge, separated stat tiles for Minted / Spent / Net Supply / Memory Reputation / Casino Play Tokens, vault headers grouped by hardware serial with a LOCAL NODE pill, sybil-flagged agent cards with red border-stripe, an STGM-priced Inference Market, and a frosted Warren Buffett OBSERVE-ONLY accountant panel.
Finance._synthesis_note: C55M-DR-CODEX did the math/data pass: removed read-time wallet mutation, replaced fake $ formatting with STGM, separated real STGM from memory reputation and casino play tokens, added live metabolic pressure/mode using the canonical wallet sum, sanitized inference-market prices, discovered local spend wallet from this node's serial/state, and gated the hidden git mesh push behind SIFTA_FINANCE_ALLOW_GIT_MESH_PUSH=1. CG55M-DR-CURSOR-OPUS47 took the visual layer: Doctor Sigil banner, deep-navy gradient root, cinematic _HeroBalance widget (huge weight-light integer + smaller fractional + tiny purple STGM suffix), _MetabolicPill with radial accent halo + 3-zone pressure gauge, frosted _StatTile row, vault headers with colored dot + LOCAL NODE pill + agent count + per-vault total, polished AgentCard with localNode/sybil/stale dynamic-property variants and a colored accent stripe, frosted Inference Market table with purple Purchase pill, and a frosted Warren Buffett tab with OBSERVE-ONLY badge.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice Life Schedule.description: Alice's practical life dashboard: Contacts, Schedule, and Health. The Schedule tab reads/writes .sifta_state/stigmergic_schedule.jsonl, the same ledger Alice uses in voice mode.

Stigmergic Writer.description: Living-page writing app. Pause 3 seconds and the swarm suggests a continuation in faded ghost text — Tab accepts. Ask Swarm rewrites a selection. Full territory history and PDF export.
Stigmergic Writer._synthesis_note: Backend (real): Ollama-driven ghost text + Ask Swarm worker, memory bus recall, .territory.jsonl history per document. Graphics polish (CG55M / Opus 4.7): paper feel with installed serif body font (Iowan Old Style → New York → Charter → Georgia), warmer ink on a deep desk background, frosted macOS-feel toolbar with a purple-accent Ask Swarm button, Doctor Sigil header at the top, polished scrollbar, accent selection color.

What Alice Sees._retired_reason: Predator v7 / desktop doctrine (2026-04-28 CG55M): camera + gaze live in the Alice OS shell (`Alice` autostart). Separate window duplicated territory; file kept for engineering.
What Alice Sees._autostart_note: Disabled 2026-04-19 by C47H — autostart unified into 'Alice'. Retired from Programs menu 2026-04-28 — use desktop Alice.

Talk to Alice._autostart_note: AG31 §7.6: Alice IS the OS — she boots with the desktop, embedded as her voice organ.

Alice._note: Alice IS the OS. The resident Alice surface is embedded by the desktop shell; this manifest row remains launchable for focus routing but must not spawn a second app window.
Alice._autostart_note: AG31 §7.6: Alice brain strip — visual cortex on desktop boot.

AG31 + C46S - PoUW Fold-Swarm Simulation.description: Protein folding proof-of-useful-work: Lennard-Jones 12-6, harmonic bonds, Metropolis annealing, ACO stigmergy, and canonical work receipts.

AG31 + C46S + C55M + CG55M - ARTIFFICIAL.description: MATH PHYSICS BIOCODE TIME SPACE CONTINUUM ART
AG31 + C46S + C55M + CG55M - ARTIFFICIAL._synthesis_note: Master synthesis app. Code-correctness lane: C55M Dr Codex / GPT-5.5. Physics + receipt binding: AG31. Graphics polish 2026-04-26: CG55M Dr Cursor / Opus 4.7 via shared Applications/_doctor_sigil_chrome.py.

CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice-Sees Calibrator.description: Gamified swarm-coherence game: wave / nod / approach / recede / still / flail at Alice's eye to drive the simulation. Six unlockable target shapes. Lives, score, streak, high-score persisted.
CG55M Dr Cursor - Alice-Sees Calibrator._synthesis_note: Reads .sifta_state/visual_stigmergy.jsonl via System.swarm_gesture_decoder.GestureDecoder. Original swarm physics in System/agentic_calibrator.py untouched.

Swarm Logistics Lab._retired_reason: AG31 audit 2026-04-26: retired. Hollow UI stub sharing sim_stream_panels.py.

Alice Safety Tracker.description: Live GPS safety tracker. Alice watches where the Architect is via iPhone GPS relay. OpenStreetMap tile map, accuracy-aware location trail, persisted home anchor, trip mode, and arrival detection.

SIFTA Physics Observatory.description: Engine A: Lennard-Jones colloidal thermodynamics — V_LJ=4ε[(σ/r)¹²−(σ/r)⁶], Langevin, phase transitions, live T [K] / P [Pa] / S [J/mol·K] / g(r).  Engine B: D2Q9 Lattice-Boltzmann fluid dynamics — BGK collision-streaming, live Re, Ma, vorticity ω_z, drag C_D. PoUW STGM minting via swarm_atp_synthase.

Research Simulators (Quantum & Epi).description: Two honest simulations: 1) Quantum Surface Code Error Correction (d=7 lattice with bit/phase flip tracking). 2) SIR Epidemiological Containment with decentralized stigmergic contact tracing.

C55M + George - Protein Fold Colosseum.description: Co-signed deterministic HP lattice beam-search protein proof engine. Folds batches, writes PDB/meta artifacts, and gives the SIFTA referee another independent structure source.

Sara Imari Walker \u2014 Assembly Theory.description: Proves Assembly Theory live: Assembly Index threshold, pheromone memory analogue, phase transition simulation, and Question Wall with honest truth labels.
references: Sara Imari Walker — Life as No One Knows It (2024)

Biological Dashboard.description: Qt biological body dashboard for Alice's organ status. Kept as the canonical System Settings health surface; no Tk import path.
